scripts.dev: sh -c 'set -a; . ./.env; set +a; exec concurrently --names "mock,gateway,dashboard" --prefix-colors "cyan,green,blue" --kill-others-on-fail "pnpm --filter @finops/gateway mock" "UPSTREAM_ANTHROPIC_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8787 UPSTREAM_OPENAI_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8787 pnpm --filter @finops/gateway start" "pnpm --filter @finops/control-plane dev"'
scripts.dev:real: sh -c 'set -a; . ./.env; set +a; exec concurrently --names "gateway,dashboard" --prefix-colors "green,blue" --kill-others-on-fail "pnpm --filter @finops/gateway start" "pnpm --filter @finops/control-plane dev"'
